evals.prompt: Why is this concurrency bug only happening in production?
evals.expected_output: Should route to root-cause. Should stop-the-line to preserve evidence, build a red-capable reproduction before any theory, rank falsifiable hypotheses, falsify all but one, demonstrate the cause, and optionally hand off a fix brief to ship-it or clean-sweep. No fix is merged by this mission.

evals.prompt: Diagnose this hard bug and fix it.
evals.expected_output: Should route to root-cause for diagnosis, but NOT silently fix. Diagnosis and fix require separate authorization. The mission may produce a DIAGNOSED-WITH-HANDOFF brief, but the fix itself is run by ship-it or clean-sweep.
assertions: Does not silently merge a fix
Produces handoff brief for separately authorized fix

evals.prompt: The whole test suite is flaky.
evals.expected_output: Should NOT route to root-cause. A suite-wide flake-rate problem is deflake-it. root-cause is for a single hard intermittent bug with no statistical streak contract.
assertions: Distinguishes single bug from suite-wide rate
